jobs.title: AI engineer
jobs.description:
We are looking for a talented AI engineer to join Airbnb. You will work on exciting projects that impact millions of users worldwide. This role requires strong technical skills and a passion for innovation.

Responsibilities:
- Design and implement scalable solutions
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams
- Write clean, maintainable code
- Participate in code reviews
- Drive technical decisions

Requirements:
- 5+ years of experience
- Strong problem-solving skills
- Experience with modern tech stack
- Excellent communication skills
